items.name: Locust Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Bring a sinister little companion to your avatar with the Locust Shoulder Pet, inspired by ancient swarm legends and eerie insect spirits whispered about in forgotten ruins.

Whether you’re building a dark sorcerer look, cursed wanderer outfit, post-apocalypse survivor, or creepy-cute collector style, this detailed shoulder companion adds a mysterious presence that people notice instantly.

⚡ Why this shoulder pet stands out:
✅ High-detail 3D locust with realistic texture
✅ Fits naturally on your shoulder with most outfits
✅Perfect for cursed, dark fantasy, swarm, or anime-inspired avatar styles
✅ Show love to the Locust crew & creator

Some say it follows powerful hosts… others say it chooses them.
Add your swarm companion today before it disappears into the wind.

items.name: Midnight Flow Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🖤 Elegant • Dramatic • Timeless
This coat drapes like a story — a flowing black silhouette that feels both mysterious and graceful. Its long cut moves naturally, almost like it’s alive with every step, while the subtle worn edges give it depth and character. Sleek leather-like textures add a modern touch, making it perfect for avatars who want to stand out with quiet confidence.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
🖤 Long, flowing design for dramatic movement
✨ PBR textures that give the fabric a realistic sheen
🧵 Detailed stitching & natural folds for authenticity
🌌 A look that works for fantasy, urban, or cinematic roleplay
🎮 Versatile style — cool, mysterious, but never harsh
🔍 Keywords: black coat, long trench coat, cinematic outfit, stylish fashion, mysterious robe, Roblox

💡 why you’ll love it
🖤 long, flowing design for dramatic movement
✨ pbr textures that give the fabric a realistic sheen
🧵 detailed stitching & natural folds for authenticity
🌌 a look that works for fantasy, urban, or cinematic roleplay
🎮 versatile style — cool, mysterious, but never harsh
